certificate.caveat: No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys).
certificate.description: The OPSWAT Cryptographic Module is a general-purpose cryptographic library incorporated in Inquest and MetaDefender Managed File Transfer, Kiosk, and Core to provide FIPS 140-3 validated cryptography for the protection of sensitive information.
